reason: The sample demonstrates strong overall quality with a coherent planner blueprint, a realistic user persona (community program coordinator), and a well-grounded assistant. All three blueprint goals are completed: formula lookup (with graceful recovery from tool error), budget calculation (correctly using solve tool), and unit conversion (correctly using convert tool). The assistant handles the formula tool failure appropriately by providing the information manually. Minor issues include the duplicate end turns (5 and 6) which appear to be a data artifact, and the namespace prefix on tool names (skill-tools-*) which is harmless. No hallucination or grounding issues present - all calculations and conversions are accurate and properly sourced from tool outputs.
